theme_notes: Touchstones: Messi's all-time World Cup scoring record broken (18 goals vs Austria, age 38); U.S. Senate's historic 50-48 war-powers rebuke of Trump over the Iran war; DRC Ebola outbreak (1,000+ cases, 250+ dead); China sanctions 10 American military companies.
settled: Like the Iran ceasefire: officially over and nobody quite knows what that means.
Zero debt. Messi scored his 18th World Cup goal this week. Both equally improbable.
Settled. Congress took 53 years to use the War Powers Act. You two are overachievers.
youOwe: Less than fifty. China sanctioned 10 companies for more principled reasons.
Messi scored 18 World Cup goals and you owe $40. Both facts feel deeply wrong.
Sub-$50. Even a symbolic Senate resolution has more weight than this.
Colombia's new president declared 49.7% a mandate. This is your mandate.
Four Republicans crossed party lines to end a war. Someone needs to end this.
Ebola gets a faster international response than your partner is getting paid.
Your partner has drafted a war powers resolution. It's symbolic. Like this relationship.
The UN has been briefed. They described it as 'deeply concerning.'
At $300, you've entered 'requires Congressional authorization' territory.
Courts approved expedited deportation procedures. This debt is next on the docket.
Seven hundred dollars. Ebola started as a rounding error. Look how that's going.
The Senate voted. Your partner voted. You're the last holdout. Pass something.
Multiple governments have been briefed. Unlike Congress, your partner has actual power.
You owe more than Messi makes per breath. He also had the dignity to show up.
Two thousand dollars. This is no longer a tab. It's a military entanglement.
The UN has declared your balance a public health emergency. Ebola got faster help.
More than Messi's 18 World Cup records cost anyone. Unlike you, he delivered.
Iran owes fewer diplomatic obligations than you owe dollars. And Iran started a war.
theyOwe: They owe you forty bucks. File a resolution. Same weight as Congress's. Zero.
Under fifty. A purely symbolic grievance. Just like the Senate. Just as toothless.
Forty bucks. The Iran war costs more per second. So does your annoyance.
Enough for a World Cup nosebleed seat. Watch Messi make history while they owe you.
Colombia's president declared 49.7% a mandate. Declare this yours.
A hundred dollars. The Ebola response fund mobilized faster than your partner.
You are the sanctioned entity. Your partner is China. You did not choose this.
Three hundred bucks. The UN is monitoring. We're all deeply concerned.
Messi scored 18 World Cup goals. Your partner can't score a Venmo payment.
Pass a war powers resolution in the group chat. Same legal effect, same reaction.
Six hundred dollars. Fifty senators said this was too much. Four Republicans agreed.
Outbreak territory. More than a thousand units of unpaid. We're tracking this.
At this amount the Court of Appeals would approve expedited collection. No hearing.
China sanctioned 10 American companies this week. Sanction one partner.
Four GOP senators broke ranks over less. Someone here needs to break something.
This debt has outlasted the Iran war, two ceasefires, and your will to be polite.
They owe you more than Messi has World Cup goals. That's 18. They owe more. Unforgivable.
The Senate voted. The UN warned. The Ebola fund mobilized. None as fast as this debt grew.
